studyName: Building on GWAS for NHLBI-Diseases: The U.S. CHARGE Consortium - Sequencing (CHARGE-S): CHS

tables.description: The data table includes subject IDs, and multiple groups the subjects are included in. These groups are cohort random sample, ECG PR interval case group, ECG QRS interval case group, pulmonary function case group, hematocrit case group, blood pressure case group, retinal venule diameter case group, stroke case group, C-reactive protein case group, carotid intima-media thickness case group, fasting insulin case group, and body mass index case group.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: in_bmi
variables.description: Included in body mass index case group

variables.name: in_bp
variables.description: Included in blood pressure case group

variables.name: in_crp
variables.description: Included in C-reactive protein case group

variables.name: in_crs
variables.description: Included in cohort random sample

variables.name: in_diabetes
variables.description: Included in fasting insulin case group

variables.name: in_eye
variables.description: Included in retinal venule diameter case group

variables.name: in_hema
variables.description: Included in hematocrit case group

variables.name: in_imt
variables.description: Included in carotid intima-media thickness case group

variables.name: in_pft
variables.description: Included in pulmonary function case group

variables.name: in_pr
variables.description: Included in ECG PR interval case group

variables.name: in_qrs
variables.description: Included in ECG QRS interval case group

variables.name: in_stroke
variables.description: Included in stroke case group

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, and name of the center which conducted sequencing.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing
